translation_findings.jp: プログラム言語を使うときの特別な約束
translation_findings.zh: 使用程序设计语言时的特殊约定
translation_findings.en: Special conventions used when working with a programming language
translation_findings.issue: JP source itself is unusual for 'プロトコル / Protocol' (a protocol normally concerns network communication, not programming-language usage). The zh and en translations are FAITHFUL to the JP source — this is a JP-source content quality concern, NOT a translation defect. Logged for upstream awareness only.
translation_findings.suggested_fix: Out of translation-track scope; flag for content-track if upstream JP needs revision.

narrative: 3 term entities (プログラム言語/アルゴリズム/プロトコル), each with surface+definition jp/zh/en. All translations are semantically faithful to the JP source. One LOW informational note: the JP definition of 'プロトコル' is itself unusual but the translations faithfully render it; this is not a translation defect.
